title: Metropack MTR
description: Pack with trains from Russian metros for MTR mod.
body:
# MetroPack MTR
**MetroPack MTR** is a resource pack for [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod that adds trains from Russian metros.

### Check the [IMP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/international-metro-pack) page before downloading, there are much more trains and features!


**This pack requires [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) to be installed along with the MTR mod!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/XPYKQ-ik6JQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Trains list
* 81-722.1/723.1/724.1 "Jubilee" ("Юбилейный")¹
* EZh3RU1/Em-508T (Еж3РУ1/Ем-508Т)
* 81-717.5/714.5 "Numbered" ("Номерной")
* 81-715/716 "I" ("И")
* 81-720/721 "Yauza" ("Яуза")
* 81-760/761 "Oka" ("Ока")
* Ema502 (Ема502)
* 81-717/714 (9050) "Blue death" ("Синяя смерть")
* 81-717/714 "2-2-2"
* 81-540.7/541.7 "Presidential" ("Президентский")
* 81-722/723/724 "Jubilee" ("Юбилейный")¹
* 81-765/766/767 "Moscow" ("Москва")
* 81-703 "Е"
* 81-703 "Е" (Saint-Petersburg livery) 
* 81-740/741 "Rusich"  ("Русич")
* 81-775/776/777 "Moscow-2020" ("Москва-2020")
* 81-717.5A/714.5A "Sokolniki" ("Сокольники")
* 81-717.6К/714.6К²
* 81-720.1/721.1 "Yauza" ("Яуза")²

_¹ - These trains are only available in 0.8.1(MTR3) or lower version_

_² - These trains are only available in 1.0.0(MTR4) or higher version_
## Credits
* **[MetroPack project](https://vk.com/metropack)** — original models
* **German Entsi** — porting of models, modelling of 81-740/741 and 81-775/776/777
* **JasonGlowning** — making sounds for trains
* **bl_tmf** — help
* **WerySkok** — scripting
* **Andrey Aminov** — modelling 81-717.5A/714.5A "Sokolniki", font for 81-740 route display
* **Stepan Skuratov** — help with textures for 81-775/776/777
* **LuneStart** — repainter and 81-540.7 and 81-540.8 owner
* **[Rumble project](https://rumblemetrostroi.ru/)** and **Czaj** — sounds for 81-717, E-trains and 81-775.x
